content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 brings million token context windows to agent workflows deepseek v4 s expanded context window lets agents work with the equivalent of an entire code repository or long document corpus in a single pass removing the chunking and summarization workarounds that have constrained long horizon agent tasks deepseek v4 ships with a one million token context window a significant step up from the context lengths standard in most deployed models and is positioned explicitly for agentic use cases in a new community post on the hugging face blog the model s architecture is engineered to maintain
